name: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B
tagline: 80B-total / 3B-active MoE with hybrid attention, in Instruct and Thinking variants; designed for high throughput and long context; open-weight.
metaDescription: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2025-09 — part of the Qwen3-Next line. 80B-total / 3B-active MoE with hybrid attention, in Instruct and Thinking…
overview: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen3-Next line. Released 2025-09. An efficiency-focused architecture line — a sparse MoE design delivering near-flagship quality at a fraction of the active parameters and inference cost.
What's notable in this version: 80B-total / 3B-active MoE with hybrid attention, in Instruct and Thinking variants; designed for high throughput and long context; open-weight.
